title: ADR metadata
description: Structured front-matter / metadata for an Architecture Decision Record. The narrative body lives in adr-NNNN-*.md; this mirrors its structured fields. ADRs are immutable after approval (supersede, never edit meaning). IDs follow the ADR-NNNN scheme.

title.description: Short title of the architectural decision.

status.description: ADR lifecycle status (decision statuses plus Implemented/Obsolete for realized/retired records).

date.description: ISO date the ADR reached its current status.

context.description: The forces and situation that make this decision necessary.

decision.description: The decision that was made, stated plainly.

consequences.description: Resulting context: what becomes easier, harder, or constrained.

alternatives.description: Alternatives considered and why they were not chosen (rejected alternatives are evidence).

promoted_from.description: The DEC- this ADR was promoted from, if any.
